response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong software craftsmanship, technical leadership potential, and a proven ability to drive projects to completion, there are critical gaps in the minimum qualifications. C++ experience is approximately 1 year versus the required 8 years, and large-scale distributed systems/infrastructure experience is 2–3 years versus the required 5 years. The candidate's career has been generalist and full-stack oriented rather than specialized in cloud infrastructure or compute platforms, making them significantly underprepared for this mid-senior technical lead role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship culture with demonstrated TDD, CI/CD, and testing practices across 10+ years
Proven technical leadership through staff roles, mentoring (Refactoring Dojos, workshops, courses), and cross-functional collaboration
Demonstrated ability to learn and work across diverse tech stacks (D, Node.js, Ember, React, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Critical gap: ~1 year of C++ experience against 8-year requirement; last C++ work was in 2015
Distributed systems/infrastructure experience of 2–3 years falls short of 5-year requirement; career has been primarily full-stack generalist
Limited production-level cloud architecture ownership; no demonstrated mentoring of cloud/DevOps engineers in infrastructure roles

key_factors.factor: Large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems experience
